title: Magnetic Cursor Buttons
description: Spring-physics magnetic buttons that bend toward your cursor, with a soft glowing blob follower — the portfolio trend of 2025.
concept: Magnetic button effects have dominated high-end portfolio design since 2023. The technique uses spring-physics (stiffness + damping) to smoothly attract interactive elements toward the cursor when it enters a threshold radius. Combined with a soft-glow cursor follower, it creates the 'premium agency' feel seen on Awwwards-winning sites. This demo isolates the core technique so you can feel exactly how the spring parameters affect the experience.
source: Pattern popularized across GitHub (e.g. nicholasgasior/magnetic-button, codrops.com tutorials, Bruno Simon portfolio)

interaction.mouse: Move near any button to feel the magnetic pull — enter the glow radius to activate
interaction.click: Click to trigger a burst-ring ripple from the button center
interaction.touch: Mobile shows the design; magnetic effect is pointer-device only
